allow: Bash(python -m poetry run core-admin dev sync --write)
Bash(/mnt/dev/CORE/.venv/bin/python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, ''/mnt/dev/CORE/src''\); from shared.config import REPO_ROOT; print\(REPO_ROOT\)")
Bash(python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; f = Path\(''/mnt/dev/CORE/src/shared/config.py''\).resolve\(\); print\(f.parents[2]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import uuid; ids=[str\(uuid.uuid4\(\)\) for _ in range\(35\)]; [print\(id\) for id in ids]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, ''/opt/dev/CORE/src''\); from shared.self_healing.remediation_interpretation.service import RemediationInterpretationService, RemediationInterpretationError; print\(''OK''\)")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=core_db psql -U core_db -d core -h 192.168.20.23 -c "SELECT subject, payload->>'reason' as reason, payload->>'file_path' as file, payload->>'write' as write_mode, payload->>'action_id' as action, created_at FROM core.blackboard_entries WHERE subject LIKE 'audit.remediation%' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=core_db psql -U core_db -d core -h 192.168.20.23 -c "SELECT length\(payload->>'proposed_fix'\) as fix_len, payload->>'violations_count' as viol_count, payload->>'file_path' as file, payload->>'canary_passed' as canary, payload->>'message' as msg, payload->>'crate_id' as crate FROM core.blackboard_entries WHERE subject LIKE 'audit.remediation.dry_run%' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=core_db psql -U core_db -d core -h 192.168.20.23 -t -A -c "SELECT payload->>'proposed_fix' FROM core.blackboard_entries WHERE subject LIKE 'audit.remediation.dry_run%' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=core_db psql -U core_db -d core -h 192.168.20.23 -t -A -c "SELECT payload->>'proposed_fix' FROM core.blackboard_entries WHERE subject LIKE '%build.py%' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=core_db psql -U core_db -d core -h 192.168.20.23 -c "SELECT subject, payload FROM core.blackboard_entries WHERE subject LIKE 'audit.violation%build.py%' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=core_db psql -h 192.168.20.23 -U core_db -d core -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE kind = 'class'\) AS classes, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE kind = 'function'\) AS functions, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE kind = 'method'\) AS methods, COUNT\(*\) AS total FROM core.symbols;")
